title: Second Generation Vermillion Bird Divine Emperor
content:
The 
Second Vermillion Bird
 is one of the three Vermillion Birds inside the 
Fallen Land
, alongside the 
Vermillion Bird Ancestor
 and the 
Fourth Generation Vermillion Bird Divine Emperor
.

Background
[
]

In the past, the 
Third Generation Vermillion Bird Divine Emperor
 betrayed the Vermillion Bird Divine Sect, stole a lot of their treasures, and sealed the three Vermillion Birds into the Fallen Land such that the First Vermillion Bird cannot leave the Heaven Test, the Second Vermillion Bird cannot leave the Great Emperor Planet, and the Fourth Vermillion Bird cannot leave the Earth Test.

It is speculated by the Vermillion Bird Ancestor that he was sent by the 
Sovereign Council
 who then used the treasures he stole to help create the 
Fire Sparrow Clan
.

History
[
]

When 
Wang Lin
 arrived on the 
Fallen Land
, he made the 
Dark Scorpion Clan
 his subordinates. When Wang Lin was fighting 
Sima Mo
's  5th Heaven's Blight avatar, the Second Generation Vermillion Bird Divine Emperor said if Wang Lin can kill Sima Mo's avatar within 5 breaths, he will protect Wang Lin at any cost. However, during the last breath, the Second Generation Vermillion Bird Divine Emperor decided to take action and kill Sima Mo's avatar with his own hands. He then gave Wang Lin the title of Young Emperor (of the Fallen Lands). When he met Wang Lin again, he had Wang Lin go through a trial that every Divine Emperor of the Vermillion Bird had to go through. After passing the trial and shocking everyone, he taught Wang Lin the secret spell of the Vermillion Bird.== Links and References ==
